title: viola × borbasii
intro: Viola × borbasii, also known as the hybrid pansy or borbas pansy, is a rare and unique plant species resulting from the cross between Viola arvensis and Viola monticola. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola × borbasii include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in the healing of wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
